title: epipactis × schmalhausenii
intro: Epipactis × schmalhausenii, also known as the Schmalhausen's helleborine, is a hybrid orchid species obtained from the cross between Epipactis helleborine and Epipactis leptochila. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Epipactis × schmalhausenii include its potential to alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Herbal preparations of Epipactis × schmalhausenii are typically made from its roots and leaves, which can be consumed as teas, infusions, or dried extracts.
